Ventilated front seats provides targeted cool air so you and your passenger can get comfortable quicker in hot weather. Getting comfortable is no sweat when you have ventilated front seats.Convenience Keyfob engine start control - Get an early start.  Remotely start your vehicle's engine from the key fob, ensuring your ride is ready to go when you get in. Now you can stay comfortable inside while your vehicle gets comfortable outside, thanks to Keyfob engine start control.Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Blind spot warning - Protect your blind side. You checked the mirror, looked over your shoulder and still nearly collided with the car next to you. Blind spot warning alerts you to the presence of a vehicle to your sides or rear so you know if you're about to make an unsafe lane change.  Replace fear and uncertainty with confidence and safety with blind spot warning.Technology and Telematics Voice activated integrated navigation system - A to B made easy! Whether it's an errand or a road trip, the voice activated integrated navigation system will guide you to your destination.  No more bulky, impossible-to-fold maps, and no more stopping to ask for directions. Just tell it where you want to go, and the voice activated integrated navigation system shows you the right way.        At Truck Ranch - Logan, we're here to Serve you!  Our staff is 100% dedicated to customer satisfaction and we understand that you need clear, transparent information throughout the car buying process.  With our live market pricing philosophy, we offer the right cars at the right price, and the transparency to back it up!

description: This Certified Jet Black 2026 Toyota Corolla Cross L would be a welcomed addition to your family/business. No Accidents!  One Owner!   Features/Packages:  Convenience If the vehicle detects prolonged driver unresponsiveness it will automatically bring the vehicle to a stop and turn on the hazard lights. If equipped, emergency services will be contacted. This intelligent cruise control system maintains a preset following distance behind another vehicle, automatically braking (to a complete stop if needed) or accelerating as required. Cruise control maintains a preset vehicle speed; automatically increasing or decreasing throttle to maintain that speed.Safety and Security With this system the driver's hands must remain on the wheel at all times but can be removed briefly (for a few seconds), otherwise the vehicle will prompt the driver to put their hands back on the wheel. The vehicle is equipped with a system that senses, and then prepares, the vehicle and/or occupants, for an impending forward collision. The vehicle constantly monitors the roadway in front of the vehicle and identifies and tracks pedestrians on an interior display. If the system determines a likely impact, it will automatically take preventative steps to avoid hitting the pedestrian. The vehicle is equipped with a camera that displays an image of the area behind the vehicle on an interior display. An active lane departure system alerts the driver of unintended movement of the vehicle out of a designated traffic lane and automatically maintains the vehicle's position within that lane. Brake assist senses panic braking from the speed of the brake pedal's travel and applies all available power brake boost.Technology and Telematics Mobile devices can wirelessly connect to the internet through the vehicle's private mobile network.  Toyota Certified Used Vehicles at South Dade ToyotaExperience the Gold Standard with Toyota Certified Used Vehicles in Homestead, FLStep into South Dade Toyota and unlock the door to a premium selection of Toyota Certified Used Vehicles. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift.  With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane.  Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you. Active blind spot system - Protect your blind side. You checked the mirror, looked over your shoulder and still nearly collided with the car next to you. An active blind spot system not only alerts you to the presence of a vehicle to your sides or rear but helps prevent you from making an unsafe lane change.  Replace fear and uncertainty with the confidence and safety of the Active blind spot system. Forward Collision and Cross Traffic Mitigation - Forward thinking with a side of safety. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. Or a vehicle runs a red light as you're approaching the intersection. That's when the Forward Collision and Cross Traffic Mitigation system comes to life. --When it senses an impending impact in front of you or on either side, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward Collision and Cross Traffic Mitigation is your doting eyes for crossing tees. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. Step inside to discover the thoughtfully designed black cloth interior that perfectly balances comfort and durability. Whether you're commuting to work or embarking on a weekend getaway the Equinox ensures every ride is a pleasure. The supportive seating combined with intuitive controls creates an environment that's as welcoming as it is practical. Under the hood the Equinox LT is powered by a robust 1.5L Turbo I4 engine delivering an impressive 175 horsepower and 203 lb-ft of torque. This powertrain is engineered to provide the perfect blend of efficiency and performance ensuring you have the power you need for highway merging and the efficiency you desire for city driving. Paired with an 8-speed automatic transmission the Equinox offers seamless shifting and a smooth responsive ride. The 2026 Chevrolet Equinox LT is not just about performance; it's about providing a driving experience that is both exhilarating and secure. With zero miles on the odometer this vehicle is a brand-new canvas for your adventures promising reliability and peace of mind from day one. Chevrolet's commitment to quality and innovation means you can trust the Equinox to be your steadfast companion on the road. As you explore the features of the Equinox LT you'll appreciate the attention to detail and the inclusion of manufacturer options that elevate your driving experience. From the advanced infotainment system to the array of safety features every aspect of this vehicle is designed with you in mind. Stay connected and entertained with cutting-edge technology that makes every drive more enjoyable and every journey more memorable. Safety is a priority and the Equinox LT is equipped with a suite of features designed to protect you and your passengers. With systems in place to assist you in avoiding potential hazards you can drive with confidence knowing that Chevrolet has your back. The combination of style performance and safety makes the Equinox LT a standout choice in the competitive SUV market. In conclusion the 2026 Chevrolet Equinox LT is more than just a vehicle; it's a statement of style a testament to innovation and a promise of reliability. Its striking gray exterior comfortable black cloth interior and powerful yet efficient engine make it the ideal choice for those who refuse to compromise on quality. Don't miss your chance to own this exceptional SUV designed to enhance every aspect of your driving experience. Visit us today and take the first step towards making the Equinox LT your own. Drive into the future with confidence and excitement and let the adventures begin!

Engineered for drivers who demand both dynamic driving experiences and everyday practicality, the F-PACE P250 R-Dynamic S sets a new benchmark in the premium midsize SUV segment. With its bold exterior styling, refined interior, and innovative features, this Jaguar SUV is designed to impress on every road and in every situation. Under the hood, the 2026 F-PACE P250 R-Dynamic S is powered by a 2.0L turbocharged inline-4 engine, delivering 246 horsepower with responsive acceleration and smooth power delivery. The 8-speed automatic transmission ensures seamless shifting, while the available Intelligent All-Wheel Drive system provides exceptional traction and control in all weather and road conditions. With precise handling, a composed ride, and Jaguars renowned driving dynamics, the F-PACE offers a sporty yet refined driving experience, whether navigating city streets, highways, or winding back roads. Inside, the F-PACE P250 R-Dynamic S offers a sophisticated and driver-focused cabin. Seating for five passengers features premium leather upholstery, available heated front seats, and power-adjustable configurations for optimal comfort. The spacious interior is complemented by a versatile cargo area with fold-flat rear seats, allowing for maximum flexibility for luggage, sports gear, or everyday essentials. High-quality materials, R-Dynamic styling touches, and ambient lighting create an upscale and modern atmosphere that elevates every journey. Technology is a cornerstone of the 2026 F-PACE P250 R-Dynamic S. The SUV comes equipped with Jaguars Pivi Pro infotainment system, featuring a 11.4-inch touchscreen, navigation, Apple CarPlay®, Android Auto, Bluetooth® connectivity, and voice recognition. Additional available features include a 12.3-inch interactive driver display, head-up display, premium audio system, and wireless charging, ensuring that drivers remain connected, informed, and entertained at all times. Intuitive controls and customizable interfaces make technology easy to use without distracting from the driving experience. Safety is paramount in the F-PACE P250 R-Dynamic S, with a comprehensive suite of driver-assistance systems. Features include Adaptive Cruise Control, Lane Keep Assist, Blind Spot Assist, Traffic Sign Recognition, Emergency Braking, and 360-degree Surround Camera, providing peace of mind in all driving situations. Jaguars advanced safety engineering, combined with responsive handling, ensures that every journey is as secure as it is enjoyable. The exterior of the 2026 F-PACE P250 R-Dynamic S is athletic and commanding, featuring Jaguars signature grille, LED headlights, sculpted body lines, and R-Dynamic styling cues. Sleek aerodynamic design, bold alloy wheels, and a refined fastback-inspired rear enhance both performance and visual appeal, ensuring this SUV makes a statement wherever it goes. The 2026 Jaguar F-PACE P250 R-Dynamic S delivers the perfect balance of performance, luxury, and versatility. Ideal for families, professionals, and driving enthusiasts, this SUV combines the practicality of a premium crossover with the dynamic performance of a sports vehicle. Whether youre commuting through the city, enjoying weekend adventures, or exploring scenic highways, the F-PACE offers an unmatched driving experience.[!@@Additional Info@@!]Navigation system: Pivi You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe. Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift.  With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane.  Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.Technology and Telematics Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. description:
Why BUY from Sponsler Donley Ford of Shelby?
When you choose this Velocity Blue  with 2 miles, you are not just buying a used vehicle - you are investing in quality, reliability and peace of mind. Our clientele depend on us for Transparent Pricing, Convenience and, most importantly, Customer FIRST Service!

 What this vehicle includes:
Ford Co-Pilot360 1.0 ($795 value)XLT Luxury Package ($1,890 value)FX4 Off-Road Package ($800 value)Equipment Group 302A ($125 value)8-Speed Automatic TransmissionUnique Cloth Front Bucket Seats2.0L EcoBoost Engine5,320 lbs GVWRAM/FM Stereo with 6 SpeakersSecuriCode Keyless Entry Keypad ($225 value)

Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.Technology and Telematics Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system.  Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road. Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
 Come on in to Sponsler Donley Ford of Shelby today at 249 Mansfield Ave Shelby OH 44875 or call 419-347-4100 to schedule a test drive!

description: The 2025 Chevrolet Trax 2RS is a compact SUV that offers a compelling blend of style, technology, and performance. With its sleek exterior design, spacious interior, and impressive fuel efficiency, this vehicle is the perfect choice for the modern driver who demands both versatility and sophistication.Highlights of this well-equipped Trax 2RS include:Remote Engine StartPower Sliding Glass Sunroof with Manual ShadeRear Park AssistAdaptive Cruise ControlLane Change Alert with Side Blind Zone AlertRear Cross-Traffic AlertWireless ChargingThe Trax 2RS also boasts a host of premium features, such as a 6-speaker audio system, automatic temperature control, and an 8-way power driver's seat. The turbocharged 1.2L engine and 6-speed automatic transmission deliver an impressive balance of power and efficiency, with an EPA-estimated 28 MPG in the city and 32 MPG on the highway.Step inside the Trax 2RS and you'll be greeted by a spacious and well-appointed cabin, featuring premium Evotex seat trim, a heated steering wheel, and a 4-way manual front passenger seat. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.  *  Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.  *  Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. description: Zoom through the streets in style with this sleek futuristic 2025 Chevrolet Malibu in sophisticated gray. Boasting a powerful yet efficient 1.5L turbo DOHC 4-cylinder engine with stop-start technology this Malibu is as smart as it is stylish. The smooth front wheel drive paired with a 5.10 final drive ratio ensures a responsive and agile ride while the 4-wheel antilock disc brakes provide reliable stopping power. Step inside the modern cabin equipped with heated front seats and a user-friendly 8" touch screen display perfect for jamming out to your favorite tunes with the 6-speaker audio system. With features like keyless start dual-zone automatic climate control and a rearview camera this Malibu is packed with convenience and comfort. Safety is a top priority with 10 airbags stability control and a rear seat reminder to ensure peace of mind on every journey. The teen driver feature allows you to monitor and coach new drivers while the available Carfax report gives you full transparency on the history of this reliable ride. It provides plenty of space for both passengers and cargo and comes with the latest driver assistance features,'' Edmunds writes, going on to also praise its smooth and responsive power. description: Just arrived is this well-built & comfortable, all-electric, FACTORY FRESH, NO-ACCIDENT, NONSMOKER 2025 Volvo EX90 Twin Motor Performance Ultra 7-Seater! ''The all-new 2025 Volvo EX90 enters a highly competitive segment, bringing a lot to the table with its comfortable driving dynamics, simple yet posh interior and comprehensive list of standard features,'' U.S. News writes. It ''feels like a more modern version of the vehicles Volvo has been making for the last few years. The design and interior comfort are great, and it's more fun to drive than you'd think just by looking at it,'' Edmunds writes. It boasts a clean design free of muss and clutter, silent interior, quick, AND responsive Google-based infotainment system! Detailed Breakdown of Awards: Wards 10 Best Interiors & UX -- The EX90 was recognized for its outstanding interior design and user experience, including aesthetics, comfort, ergonomics, materials, fit-and-finish, and user-friendly technology. The judges specifically praised the high-resolution main display, user-friendly interface, and the Bowers & Wilkins audio system. World Luxury Car -- The EX90 was named the 2025 World Luxury Car, a prestigious award recognizing vehicles that excel in luxury, technology, and overall driving experience. The judges highlighted the EX90's comfortable and refined interior, advanced safety technology, and distinctive Scandinavian design. The EX90's use of sustainable materials like Nordico was also a key factor in its recognition. The Volvo EX90 with 21-inch wheels gets an EPA-estimated 86 MPG-equivalent in the city and 82 MPGe on the highway. With 20- and 22-inch wheels, it delivers 83/78 MPGe. Volvo also estimates a driving range of 300 to 310 miles, depending on the wheel size. description: Vehicle Details: Discover the 2026 Ford F-150 Raptor 4WD with a potent 3.5L V6 gasoline engine  now available in Wooster, OH. This high-performance off-road truck delivers commanding capability and modern convenience, engineered for drivers who demand strength, confidence, and advanced technology. The Raptor's proven 3.5L V6 pairs exceptional towing and hauling performance with refined on-road manners, while 4WD ensures traction and control across Ohio terrain and beyond.  Inside, enjoy seamless connectivity with Apple CarPlay and Hands Free Bluetooth, keeping navigation, music, and calls accessible without distraction. Adaptive Cruise Control provides comfortable highway driving with automatic speed adjustments, and Cross-Traffic Alert enhances safety when backing out of crowded parking spaces. Remote Start adds everyday convenience, letting you warm up or cool down the cabin before you climb in.  This 2026 Ford F-150 Raptor balances rugged capability with refined amenities and the latest driver-assist technology, making it an ideal choice for work, play, and family trips. Located in Wooster, OH, this Raptor is competitively priced and offered at the best price locally  a smart value for drivers seeking peak performance and advanced features. Schedule a test drive today and experience the impressive power, technology, and confidence the Ford F-150 Raptor 4WD brings to every journey.  Equipment: The leather seats in this 1/2 ton pickup are a must for buyers looking for comfort, durability, and style. Start the Ford F-150 from inside with remote start. An off-road package is equipped on this 2026 Ford F-150 . It offers Android Auto for seamless smartphone integration. The installed navigation system will keep you on the right path. The vehicle has auto-adjust speed for safe following. Bluetooth technology is built into this 1/2 ton pickup, keeping your hands on the steering wheel and your focus on the road. See what's behind you with the back up camera on this vehicle. Keep your hands warm all winter with a heated steering wheel in  it . This vehicle offers Apple CarPlay for seamless connectivity. description: TREAT YOURSELF TO THIS 2026 TOYOTA SEQUOIA CAPSTONE 4WD!! THIS VEHICLE WILL NOT LAST!! Rule the road in the pinnacle of Toyota luxury. This Blueprint 2026 Sequoia Capstone is a masterclass in full-size SUV design, blending massive hybrid power with an interior that rivals executive lounges. With the added TRD Off-Road Package, this specific Capstone is a rare "do-it-all" buildequally at home at the valet stand or on a rugged trail in Caledonia.  i-FORCE MAX: Hybrid Power Without Compromise The Sequoia doesn't just use a hybrid system for efficiency; it uses it for domination:  Twin-Turbo V6 Hybrid: This powertrain generates a massive 437 Horsepower and a class-leading 583 lb-ft of Torque, providing instant acceleration that defies the vehicle's size.  10-Speed Automatic Intelligence: Whether you're towing a boat to Lake Michigan or merging onto I-94, the 10-speed transmission offers smooth, decisive shifts and specialized TOW/HAUL modes.  Real-World Capability: Even with 4WD, you'll enjoy an impressive 22 MPG Highway, proving you don't have to choose between muscle and miles-per-gallon.  The Capstone Experience: A New Level of Luxury As the flagship trim, the Capstone is outfitted with exclusive materials and high-end tech that set it apart from every other SUV in its class:  Shale Premium Textured Leather: New for 2026, this stunning light grey interior features a diamond-stitched pattern and unique "baseball mitt" leather accents.  Standard Massaging Front Seats: Turn your Milwaukee commute into a spa day with customizable upper and lower body massage settings.  Acoustic Glass & Power Running Boards: Enjoy a whisper-quiet cabin thanks to sound-insulated windows, and enter with ease using the power-deploying running boards.  14-Inch Toyota Audio Multimedia: A massive high-definition touchscreen with Wireless Apple CarPlay & Android Auto, paired with a 14-speaker JBL Premium Audio system.  TRD Off-Road: Ready for the Untamed Path Unlike most luxury SUVs, this Capstone is equipped with the TRD Off-Road Package, adding serious hardware for Milwaukee winters and beyond:  Bilstein Off-Road Shocks: Tuned to soak up large bumps while maintaining a refined ride on the street.  Locking Rear Differential: Provides maximum traction in low-grip conditions like deep snow or mud.  Crawl Control & Multi-Terrain Select: Advanced "off-road cruise control" systems that automatically modulate the throttle and brakes so you can focus on steering.  Underbody Protection: Includes a TRD Front Skid Plate to protect vital components from road debris and trail obstacles.  Why Shop Serra Toyota of Milwaukee? description: Introducing the 2005 Buick Terraza CXL  a perfect blend of comfort, style, and practicality for families and adventurers alike! This spacious minivan is powered by a robust 3.0L NA V6 overhead valves (OHV) 12V engine, delivering a smooth and reliable ride that you can count on for all your journeys, whether its a quick trip to the grocery store or a family road trip.  Step inside, and youll be greeted by a well-appointed interior that exudes warmth and sophistication. The Terraza CXL comfortably seats up to seven passengers, making it a fantastic option for larger families or those who love to travel with friends. The plush cloth seating offers plenty of support, and with generous legroom in all rows, everyone can stretch out and enjoy the ride.  The CXL trim comes with a host of factory default features designed to enhance your driving experience. The front seats are designed for optimal comfort, with adjustable headrests and a 60/40 split-folding rear seat for added versatility in cargo space. description: This  2026 Ford F-250 Platinum Crew Cab 4X4 includes a 5-inch BDS Stage II Radius Arm  w/Fox 2.0 Smooth Body Shocks and Four Wheel Alignment, 24-inch Vossen Forged GNX-01 Gloss Black Wheels, 37X13.50R24 Nitto Recon Grappler Tires, Professionally Installed Window Tint w/Lifetime Warranty. Installed by our Certified  Tech: Cody! *Modifications are optional and are not included in the advertised price.* Authority comes standard in our 2026 Ford F-250 Platinum Crew Cab 4X4 with the FX4 Off-Road Package in Argon Blue Metallic, combining diesel strength and confident 4X4 traction to take on demanding workloads without hesitation. Motivated by a TurboCharged 6.7 Liter PowerStroke High Output Diesel V8 supplying 500hp and 1200lb-ft of torque to a 10 Speed Automatic transmission for mighty strength. Our Platinum includes Pro Power Onboard, built-in payload and trailer tongue scales, a power tailgate, power deployable running boards, LED exterior lighting, twin-panel sunroof, a 5-inch BDS Stage II Radius Arm  w/Fox 2.0 Smooth Body Shocks and Four Wheel Alignment, 24-inch Vossen Forged GNX-01 Gloss Black Wheels, 37X13.50R24 Nitto Recon Grappler Tires, Professionally Installed Window Tint w/Lifetime Warranty, FX4 Off-Road Pack's skid plates/decals, and PowerScope trailer mirrors to support demanding work and towing tasks. Our Platinum cabin delivers premium comfort with heated/ventilated leather power front seats, heated rear seats, a heated leather-wrapped steering wheel, dual-zone automatic climate control, power-adjustable pedals, and a power sliding rear window. Technology is anchored by a 12-inch center touchscreen and a 12-inch digital driver display, providing connected navigation, Apple CarPlay/Android Auto, wireless charging, WiFi compatibility, Bluetooth, voice recognition, and B O Unleashed audio by Bang Olufsen. For safer trucking, Ford offers a head-up display, Pro Trailer Backup/Hitch Assist, front/rear automatic braking, trailer blind-spot monitoring, a 360-degree camera system, lane-keeping assistance, a tailgate-down camera, parking sensors, and more. Ready for a workout, our F-250 Platinum is a better way to go! Save this Page and Call for Availability. We Know You Will Enjoy Your  Trucks Lubbock Test Drive Towards Ownership!  Trucks has built an unmatched reputation over the last two decades for customizing and selling thousands of the highest quality used vehicles in the country. description: Discover the perfect balance of rugged capability and refined comfort with the 2020 Subaru Outback Onyx Edition XT. This exceptional SUV is a true testament to Subaru's commitment to engineering excellence, offering a seamless blend of advanced features and exceptional performance.  Boasting a sleek and sophisticated exterior in a stunning Black finish, this Outback Onyx Edition XT is a head-turner on the road. Complementing its bold appearance are a host of premium features, including:   1 Owner**  Accident Free Carfax Report**  AUTO-DIMMING EXTERIOR MIRROR W/APPROACH LIGHT  SPLASH GUARDS  ALL-WEATHER FLOOR LINERS  CARGO NET  DOME LIGHT LED UPGRADE  Under the hood, the Outback Onyx Edition XT is powered by a potent 2.4L 4-Cylinder DOHC 16V engine, delivering an impressive 23 city / 30 highway MPG. Paired with the seamless Lineartronic CVT and Subaru's legendary Symmetrical All-Wheel Drive system, this SUV offers unparalleled confidence and control, whether navigating winding roads or tackling challenging terrain.  Slip into the driver's seat and experience the exceptional comfort and convenience of the Outback Onyx Edition XT. Heated front bucket seats and heated rear seats ensure you and your passengers stay cozy, while the power liftgate provides effortless access to the spacious cargo area. The Subaru STARLINK 11.6" Multimedia Plus system keeps you connected and entertained with advanced features like Apple CarPlay and Android Auto integration.  Subaru's commitment to safety is evident in the Outback Onyx Edition XT, which boasts a suite of advanced driver-assistance technologies, including Eyesight Driver Assist, Blind Spot Detection, and Rear Cross-Traffic Alert. These cutting-edge systems work together to help keep you and your loved ones safe on the road. The wheels fit the vehicle well and update the overall appearance without compromising ride quality.  Inside, the cabin delivers the luxury you expect from a Range Rover, with comfortable seating, upscale materials, and a commanding driving position. These vehicles are equally at home as a daily driver, long distance cruiser, or luxury SUV with real off road capability.  Whether you are looking for a classic supercharged Range Rover, a capable luxury SUV, or a distinctive vehicle with timeless design, this 2006 Range Rover Supercharged is a strong option.
